series_metadata.series_title: Certified Muncipal, County, and Township Building
series_metadata.series_description: File contains records, applications and certification of building departments; ordinances/resolutions, and limitations of certifications.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain certification until records are no longer created by this agency, then microfilm. After microfilm has been checked for quality and completeness, destroy hard copy. ; Microform: Transfer microfilm to archives., Paper: Wastepaper ; Microform: Archives
